name: langid
description: A plugin that detects the natural language of a document's text content using langid.py, returning an ISO 639-1 language code and confidence score.

process.description: Detect the language of the document's extracted text content.

filePath.description: The path to the source document.

ocrText.description: OCR-extracted text from upstream plugins (e.g. ocrmypdf).

textContent.description: Extracted text content from upstream plugins (e.g. markitdown).

installed.description: Check if the langid Python package is available.

install.description: Install the langid Python package via pip.

success.description: Indicates whether langid was installed successfully.
